title: micromeria tenuis var. soriae
intro: Micromeria tenuis var. soriae, also known as Soria's mint, is a plant species belonging to the Lamiaceae family, closely related to the mint and oregano genera. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Soria's mint include its potential to reduce nausea, improve digestion, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. It is often prepared as a tea or infused oil, or used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being and relief from various health conditions.
